subcommands.description: Prints list of supported regions

subcommands.name: render
subcommands.description: Render media on Lambda

args.name: serve-url
args.description: URL or name of the site

args.name: out-name
args.description: Where the output should be downloaded. No download it omitted

options.name: --max-retries
options.description: How many times a chunk can be retried before the render times out

options.name: --frames-per-lambda
options.description: How many frames should be rendered per chunk

options.name: --props
options.description: Pass input props as filename or as JSON

options.name: --disable-headless
options.description: Run Chrome in normal mode rather than headless

options.name: --user-agent
options.description: User agent to use for Chrome during rendering

options.name: --disable-web-security
options.description: Disable CORS and other web security features

options.name: --concurrency-per-lambda
options.description: Concurrency with which each Lambda function should render

options.name: --overwrite
options.description: Overwrite a video if it already exists in the S3 bucket

options.name: --function-name
options.description: Name of the function that should be invoked

options.name: --renderer-function-name
options.description: Use a different function to render the video. By default, use the same function as the one to start the render

options.name: --timeout
options.description: The time in milisecond that a delayRender() may take before it times out

options.name: --quality
options.description: Quality for rendered frames, JPEG only, 0-100

options.name: --scale
options.description: Upscale or downscale or the dimensions of the video

options.name: --audio-codec
options.description: Codec to be used for the audio

options.name: --every-nth-frame
options.description: Render only every nth frame (only for GIFs)

options.name: --number-of-gif-loops
options.description: How many times a GIF should loop. 0 = No loop

options.name: --video-bitrate
options.description: Customize the output video bitrate. Mutually exclusive with --crf

options.name: --crf
options.description: FFMPEG CRF value, controls quality, see docs for info

options.name: --frames
options.description: Render a portion or a still of a video, 0-9, 50

options.name: --prores-profile
options.description: ProRes profile, need --codec=prores to be set

options.name: --x264-preset
options.description: Presets balance encoding speed and compression quality, with slower presets achieving better compression. Needs --codec=h264 to be set

options.name: --image-format
options.description: Format to render the frames in, "jpeg" or "png"

options.name: --pixel-format
options.description: Custom pixel format, see docs for available values

options.name: --config
options.description: Custom location for a Remotion config file

options.description: Quality for rendered frames, JPEG only, 0-100

options.description: Upscale or downscale or the dimensions of the video
